metadata.note: Rankings derived from ACS 5-year estimates, DOLA population projections, HUD CHAS cost-burden data, LEHD LODES commuting flows, AMI gap modeling, ACS B25004 vacancy status, Opportunity Insights, EPA Smart Location data, amenities, and QCT/DDA context. Overall need score weights: 55% community need and 45% opportunity. Commuter pressure is an augment-only community-need multiplier, not a standalone weight. Generated by scripts/hna/build_ranking_index.py.

metrics.label: Overall Housing Need Score
metrics.description: QAP-aligned screening index (0–100) blending Community Need (55%) and Opportunity / Geography (45%). Community Need uses B1 need factors with commuter pressure as an augment-only multiplier. Opportunity blends mobility, walkability, amenity access, and QCT/DDA context. Entries with imputed, county-context, or aggregated inputs receive a light confidence down-weight.

metrics.label: Community Need Axis
metrics.description: Type-scoped percentile score for QAP-style community need after commuter augment-only adjustment

metrics.label: Opportunity Axis
metrics.description: Type-scoped percentile blend of mobility, walkability/transit, amenity access, and QCT/DDA context

metrics.label: Gap Pressure Score
metrics.description: Type-scoped percentile blend of absolute 30% AMI unit gap and gap rate per low-income household

metrics.label: Opportunity Mobility Score
metrics.description: Population-weighted Opportunity Insights tract mobility index aggregated to geography

metrics.label: Walkability / Transit Score
metrics.description: Population-weighted EPA Smart Location walk/transit score aggregated from tracts

metrics.label: Amenity Access Score
metrics.description: Centroid-radius access score for grocery, healthcare, schools, and transit stops; rural sparsity is labeled in context fields

metrics.label: QCT / DDA Score
metrics.description: QCT tract-share or county-level DDA context for the LIHTC 30% basis-boost geography signal

metrics.label: 30% AMI Gap Rate
metrics.description: 30% AMI unit deficit divided by households at or below 30% AMI; suppressed below the minimum denominator floor

metrics.label: Cost-Burden Pressure Score
metrics.description: Type-scoped percentile blend of all-renter cost burden, severe renter burden, and deep-tier renter burden

metrics.label: % Severely Rent-Burdened
metrics.description: HUD CHAS share of renter households paying at least 50% of income on housing

metrics.label: % Burdened at ≤50% AMI
metrics.description: HUD CHAS share of renter households at or below 50% AMI paying at least 30% of income on housing

metrics.label: Affordability Intensity Score
metrics.description: Type-scoped percentile blend of median home value-to-income and median gross rent-to-income ratios

metrics.label: Future Pressure Score
metrics.description: Type-scoped percentile blend of DOLA 20-year incremental unit need and senior-share growth

metrics.label: Overcrowding Pressure Score
metrics.description: Type-scoped percentile rank of ACS occupied units with more than 1.0 occupants per room

metrics.label: Housing Units Needed (30% AMI)
metrics.description: Deficit of affordable housing units at 30% AMI

metrics.label: % Rent-Burdened Households
metrics.description: Percentage of renter households paying ≥30% of income on housing

metrics.label: % Overcrowded Households
metrics.description: ACS DP04 occupied units with 1.01 or more occupants per room divided by occupied units; suppressed below the minimum denominator floor

metrics.label: Units Needed at 30% AMI
metrics.description: Unit deficit at 30% of Area Median Income

metrics.label: Units Needed at 50% AMI
metrics.description: Unit deficit at 50% of Area Median Income

metrics.label: Units Needed at 60% AMI
metrics.description: Unit deficit at 60% of Area Median Income (primary LIHTC tier)

metrics.label: % Burdened at ≤30% AMI
metrics.description: CHAS: percentage of renter households at or below 30% AMI that are cost-burdened

metrics.label: % Burdened at 31–50% AMI
metrics.description: CHAS: percentage of renter households at 31–50% AMI that are cost-burdened

metrics.label: % Burdened at 51–80% AMI
metrics.description: CHAS: percentage of renter households at 51–80% AMI that are cost-burdened

metrics.label: In-Commuters (LEHD)
metrics.description: Workers employed in this county who live in another county (LEHD LODES OD)

metrics.label: In-Commute Ratio
metrics.description: Share of local jobs filled by workers living outside the geography (%)

metrics.label: Commuter Pressure Score
metrics.description: Type-scoped percentile blend of in-commuter count (50%) and in-commute ratio (50%)

metrics.label: Score Confidence Multiplier
metrics.description: Multiplier applied to the raw composite score for imputed or county-approximated score inputs

metrics.label: Population (20-yr Projection)
metrics.description: DOLA-projected population approximately 20 years from base year

metrics.label: Current Population
metrics.description: ACS 5-year estimate of total population

metrics.label: Median Household Income
metrics.description: ACS median household income (most recent vintage)

metrics.label: % Renter-Occupied
metrics.description: Percentage of occupied housing units that are renter-occupied

metrics.label: Active-Market Vacancy Rate
metrics.description: ACS B25004 for-rent plus for-sale-only vacant units divided by total housing units; small renter-base places fall back to county active-market vacancy

metrics.label: Raw Rental Vacancy Rate
metrics.description: ACS DP04 raw rental vacancy rate retained for transparency

metrics.label: Seasonal Share of Vacant Units
metrics.description: ACS B25004 seasonal, recreational, or occasional-use vacant units as a share of all vacant units

metrics.label: Median Gross Rent
metrics.description: ACS median gross rent (rent + utilities)
